heading: Powers as cumulative and additional
label: 1591d Powers as cumulative and additional
text: Except as may be otherwise expressly provided in this Act, all powers and authorities conferred by this Act shall be cumulative and additional to and not in derogation of any powers and authorities otherwise existing.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, means , , known as the Defense Housing and Community Facilities and Services Act of 1951.
